name: Roasting Corn/grandpa's (Xrtb29a)1i25
recipeIngredient: 8 ears of Corn; fresh, husks left intact
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a medium hot fire (the same as cooking steaks).
2. Dampen the husks with water.
3. If desired, wrap each ear of corn in foil.
4. Grill for 15-20 minutes, turning occasionally to roast both sides evenly.
5. When ready to serve, carefully remove the husks.
6. Spread butter on the kernels and drizzle with lime juice, salt, and chile powder to taste.
